message:
feat(phase3): multi-agent Phase 3 infrastructure — io_uring lanes, S3-FIFO, OPE, VOI profiler

Shared work from multiple agents on PERF-3X Phase 3:
- hostcall_io_uring_lane: telemetry envelope, fallback-code matrix
- hostcall_s3_fifo: tri-queue admission with tenant fairness
- extension_scoring: mean-field controller + OPE evaluator + clippy fixes
- extension_dispatcher: dual-exec oracle, io_uring bridge dispatch
- extensions_js/extensions: extension API enhancements
- ext_workloads: hostcall workload benchmark harness
- lib.rs: module declarations for extension_replay, hostcall_s3_fifo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
